name: Sister Beatrice
subtitle: chaplain of Ward C · thirty years

ultimate_ability.label: The Small Candle
ultimate_ability.description: Once per game. Light one small candle wherever you are; every visitor on the board gains one step toward connection AND the VIGIL track loses two. The candle is lit for the room, not the dead.

notes: Sister Beatrice's hand for the Death arcana. VIGIL is the second stat. Scenarios: walpurgisnacht (canonical), matins_the_morning_after (easier), the_quiet_committal (hardest · at parish_cemetery).
